title.en: Moreover, not all high-quality third-order Supr...

content.en:
Ye Tian knew very well that what these Nine Folds Dao Realm powerhouses craved most were nothing more than two things.

The first is the legendary blood, and the second is the third sequence to Dao bone = regular item with little side effects.

The best is a perfect quality third-order supreme rule item, followed by a top-quality item, and the bottom line is a high-quality third-order supreme rule item.

Moreover, not all high-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items are required.

Some high-quality third-order supreme rule items still have great side effects, and there is no means to erase the side effects, then no one wants them.

Only if there is still a way to erase it similar to the black water of the eternal night, will there be a Ninefold Dao Realm acquisition.

"I don't have a high-quality third-order supreme rule item in my hand right now, nor do I have legendary blood, so let's kill a legendary-level creature in the legendary realm first and extract the legendary blood, or find a high-quality third-order supreme rule item and trade it with other ninefold supreme dao realms. "

Ye Tian thought so.

Subsequently.

He copied a replica body, left the legendary ancient city, and went to the legendary world to find a legendary creature.

He didn't need to cooperate with the other Ninefold Dao Realms, he was enough.

Of course.

Before he left, there were still many squads who invited him, but he refused them all.

......

The legendary world is very large, and many places are the territory of legendary creatures, and some legendary creatures are even extremely terrifying, even the top team will be killed by such terrifying legendary creatures.

For example, a legendary creature with the blood of the strongest legend is so terrifying that the price to pay to kill such a legendary creature is unimaginable, and it depends on luck.

Ye Tian didn't have any information about the Legendary Realm, but he didn't need this thing either, so he walked aimlessly.

Finally, he found a legendary creature.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying giant snake hovered over a mountain peak, and the aura on its body was comparable to that of the ancient giant bird that had been in the Lost Realm at the beginning.

"The legendary creature black-veined giant serpent, that's you!"

Ye Tian prepared to hunt down this legendary creature.

Of course, if you want to kill this legendary creature, it is estimated that it is a bit difficult to just copy the body of a real body.

He had tried to kill the Giant Bird, but he let it run away and hide in its nest.

However, the black-veined giant snake doesn't seem to have such a nest, and multiple replica bodies are besieging him, plus his strength is now stronger than in the past, there should be hope to besiege and kill this black-veined giant snake.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian's duplicate body after another condensed.

Then, he struck at the black-veined serpent.

Bang!!!!!

The battle broke out!

Ye Tian used the third sequence of supreme rules to suppress this black-veined giant snake.

Soon, the injuries of the black-veined giant snake became more and more serious, and it was finally killed by Ye Tian.

"Close!"

The body of the black-veined giant snake was put away by Ye Tian.

After that, he scraped some resources here to see if he could find some good things.

"There's really something good!"

Ye Tian found a cave with a lot of precious resources, which should be the collection of the black-veined giant snake, among which there were six third-order supreme rule items alone, and among them, there was a high-quality third-order supreme rule item.

It can be said that Ye Tian's luck is quite good!

"Put it all away!"

Ye Tian thought about it and put it away.

After that, instead of continuing to hunt legendary creatures, he returned to the legendary ancient city.

He was going to exchange this high-quality third-order Supreme Rule item and Legendary Blood for more low-quality third-order Supreme Rule items.

......

Legend of the ancient city.

Ye Tian is back.

He didn't sell the Legendary Blood immediately, but instead took out a high-quality third-order Supreme Dao Rule item.

When Ye Tian announced that he had exchanged a high-quality third-order supreme rule item for a low-quality third-order supreme rule item, many of the Ninefold Supreme Dao realms were shocked.

"This is a high-quality third-order supreme rule item - ghost snake mother stone, the side effect is to hurt the mind, and some treasures can get rid of the side effects, I want to exchange high-quality third-order supreme rule items for low-quality third-order supreme rule items, whoever takes out more third-order supreme rule items, I will sell them to whom. "

Ye Tian stood there and sold directly.

"Ye Tian, what you said is true?"

A Ninefold Dao Realm asked.

"Of course!" Ye Tian affirmed.

"I'll give out ten low-quality third-order Supreme Dao Rule items in exchange for the Ghost Snake Mother Stone. A Ninefold Dao Realm said.

"What, ten low-quality third-order supreme rule items want to be exchanged for high-quality third-order supreme rule items? What are you thinking? I'll give out thirty pieces!"

"I'll give you fifty!"

"I'll give out sixty!"

A nine-fold Dao realm frantically bidding.

And.

Although some Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms did not have enough low-quality Third Rank Supreme Dao Rule items, they could purchase Third Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items from other Nine Noble Dao Realms to increase their price.

So, the bidding is getting frenzier and frantic.

"Sure enough, this group of Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms has been here for I don't know how many years, and some of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms who have taken the path of the strongest to the Dao have not yet comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Supreme Dao, and they will definitely bid wildly. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the end, a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm bid for ninety-eight low-quality third-order Dao Rule items, which was the highest price.

"Deal!"

Ye Tian took out the Ghost Snake Mother Stone, and the other party also gathered together ninety-eight low-quality third-order supreme rule items and handed them over to Ye Tian, completing the transaction.

Just as everyone was about to leave, Ye Tian took out the corpse of the legendary creature Black Veined Giant Serpent.

"Everyone, the corpse of the legendary creature, which has just been killed, and has not extracted the blood of legend, you can buy it back, and you can slowly extract the blood of legend by yourself, and it is still the highest bidder. Of course, I still only need low-quality third-order Supreme Path Rule items. "

Ye Tian said.

"What, the corpse of a legendary creature, just killed?"

"Could it be that Ye Tian killed him? he alone can kill a legendary-level creature?"

"It can be done, for example, if he comprehends the rules of the third sequence of the supreme path, and the realm is very high, and if he masters the third sequence of the supreme dao supernatural power, he can kill ordinary legendary-level creatures. "

"So, wouldn't Ye Tian be able to hunt legendary-level creatures all the time?"

"You have to take a risk, and if you encounter a legendary creature with the blood of the strongest legend, you are also at risk of being killed. The Ninefold Dao Realm, who truly comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Supreme Dao, had already gone out to break through the legend to the Dao Realm, and would not stay here. "

Immediately, many Ninefold Dao Realm frantically bid.

Legendary creatures, even if they are ordinary, they want it!
